name: create_cron_job
description: Create a scheduled task (cron job) that runs a prompt on a schedule. Use when the user wants recurring reminders, checks, or automated tasks. Cron jobs run server-side via the /chat path; the interactive/device-bound providers (agents, gemini-agents, realtime, local) are OUT of cron scope and not selectable here.

name.description: A short, descriptive name for this task (e.g., 'Morning Server Check')

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction that will be sent to the AI when the job fires

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g., '0 7 * * *' for daily at 7 AM, '*/30 * * * *' for every 30 minutes)

frequency_hint.description: Human-readable description of the schedule (e.g., 'Every day at 7 AM')

model.description: A provider word (gemini/openai/claude/grok/computer-use) for that provider's default, OR a specific model id from GET /models/{provider}. Empty = the provider's configured default (Auto). Use 'computer-use' for tasks needing desktop/browser/GUI interaction.

provider.description: Which provider routes this job: one of gemini, openai, claude, grok, computer-use. Optional; if omitted it is derived from the model. The interactive/device-bound providers (agents, gemini-agents, realtime, local) are OUT of cron scope.

delivery.description: How to deliver the result (default: snapshot)

delivery_target.description: Phone number for SMS/voice delivery (E.164 format), not needed for snapshot/notification

one_shot.description: If true, run once and auto-delete (for one-time reminders). Default: false
